positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical circular emblem featuring interwoven elements of luminous lunar flora and cosmic geometric mandalas. The central focus is a stylized, bioluminescent orchid blooming from a crystalline moon crescent. Incorporate delicate silhouettes of orbiting planets and minimalist constellations connecting the botanical motifs. Style should be modern occult-minimalism, using high contrast black and white line art accented with gradients of deep indigo, soft lavender, and shimmering gold leaf effects. The composition must be perfectly centered, highly scalable, and optimized for printing on fabric. Clean lines, intricate negative space, and strong graphic quality.
negative: low quality, blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, dirty, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, jpeg artifacts, solid colors, simple gradients
